data.title: Scaling a Social-First Content Machine
data.description: How a systemic overhaul turned Mary Kay Brasil into the #1 TikTok account in the brand's global network.

content:
Mary Kay Brasil needed to rejuvenate its brand perception and connect with the Gen-Z audience while maintaining the rigor of a global beauty powerhouse. But the existing production model was centralized, slow, and expensive — locked in a reactive always-on cycle that was filling the calendar without building a community.

## The Diagnosis

Through algorithmic diagnostics and a deep dive into the production funnel, it became clear that traditional, over-produced content was failing to capture the native attention span of TikTok and Reels. The pipeline lacked a real-time feedback loop, and the disconnect between high-end studio craft and native social language was costing the brand its cultural relevance among younger consumers.

## The System

**Hybrid Production Model:** I architected a systemic transition from a strict studio-only model to an agile, hybrid framework. By incorporating decentralized mobile creators alongside studio shoots, we built a native UGC-style production line that matched platform language perfectly.

**Operational Governance & Agile Approvals:** I integrated the client directly into the pre-production phase and on-set routines. This systemic change eliminated feedback latency, mitigating operational debt and reducing reflows drastically.

**B2B2C Sales Enablement:** Centralized the content pipeline to feed a direct WhatsApp channel ("Quero+ Mary Kay"), providing the sales force with agile, conversion-focused assets — GIFs, audios, and vertical videos — to drive direct sales.

**PR & Community Innovation:** Modernized the B2B2C communication by orchestrating a pioneering partnership with Elle magazine, introducing the virtual creator Ellen as the official spokesperson for the Mary Kay Seminar.

## The Impact

Global Benchmark: secured the definitive #1 spot for Mary Kay's TikTok account worldwide. Audience Rejuvenation: propelled a +75% increase in the Gen-Z audience across digital channels. Performance at Scale: generated over 3.4M organic interactions on Instagram. Operational Efficiency: sustained a consistent output of 70+ high-performing assets per month, significantly lowering the cost-per-asset while maximizing cultural relevance.
